markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.334 — Texas Outstanding Service Medal

The department shall issue specialty license plates for recipients of the Texas Outstanding Service Medal. The license plates must include the Texas Outstanding Service Medal emblem and must include the words “Texas Outstanding Service Medal” at the bottom of each plate.

*Added by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 385 (H.B.282), Sec. 2, eff. September 1, 2023.*
